zh.Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Verdun於1310年8月10日出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，她的父親Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun31歲，母親Elizabeth de Clare15歲。她於1327年2月20日之前與William Blount結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1337年享年27歲。

zh-hans.Bristol, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Verdun于1310年8月10日出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun31岁，母亲Elizabeth de Clare15岁。她于1327年2月20日之前与William Blount结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1337年享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Verdun was born on 10 August 1310, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth de Clare, was 15. She married William Blount before 20 February 1327. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1337, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Verdun est née le 10 août 1310, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Clare, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William Blount avant 20 février 1327. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1337, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Verdun am 10. August 1310 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Clare 15. Sie hat vor 20. Februar 1327 William Blount geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1337 im Alter von 27 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Verdun è nata il il 10 agosto 1310 nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Clare, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato William Blount prima del 20 febbraio 1327. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1337, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Verdunが1310年8月10日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdunは31歳，母Elizabeth de Clareは15歳であった。1327年2月20日以前にWilliam Blountと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1337年に27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Verdun(이)가 1310년 8월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Clare(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1327년 2월 20일 이전 William Blount(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1337년 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Verdun nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1310, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Clare, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com William Blount antes 20 de fevereiro de 1327. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1337, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Verdun родилась 10 августа 1310 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Clare, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Blount перед 20 февраль 1327 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1337 г. в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Verdun nació el 10 de agosto de 1310, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Theobald de Verdun 2nd Lord Verdun, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Clare, tenía 15 años. Se casó con William Blount antes de 20 de febrero de 1327. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1337, a la edad de 27 años.
